items.title: Laos cave survivors help with plan to find last two missing men
items.summary: So far, five men have been freed from the narrow, flooded cave but efforts are ongoing to locate two more.

items.title: Incredibly Rare Bongos Caught on Trail Cam in Area They Were Thought to be Extinct
items.summary: It’s World Bongo Day today, and scientists dedicated to their survival have shared new field camera images that prove these magnificent animals have reappeared in a region where they were thought to b…
